untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) two sequential impulse moves in opposite directions with specific magnitude relationships, (2) triangle consolidation pattern with tightening range, (3) prior parabolic climax context, and (4) countertrend retracement percentage threshold. These multi-bar pattern recognition and relative magnitude comparison requirements cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicator comparisons and the allowed operators. The pattern detection logic requires historical swing analysis, peak/trough identification, and range contraction measurements that are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: GRIMES_DRY_5_0 describes a complex multi-bar consolidation pattern that requires visual pattern recognition capabilities beyond point-in-time indicator thresholds. A proper implementation would need: (1) swing high/low detection across multiple bars, (2) move magnitude comparison (countertrend_retracement_percent parameter undefined), (3) triangle pattern recognition (range convergence over N bars), and (4) parabolic climax context. The allowed indicators cannot capture these requirements. Recommend implementing this as a custom pattern recognition module outside the JSON rules engine.
